prestart.reminder: Pēhia te Play (▶) i te Matapihi Mānu ina rite koe ki te tīmata. Kia tīmata te whakamātautau, kaua e pēhi Pause (⏸) kia mutu rā anō tō pānui: ka whakakapi te Pause i te whakamātautau; kāore e whakatā i te matawā. Pēhia Stop/Reset (⏹) anake mēnā e hiahia ana koe ki te whakakore i te whakamātautau.

entry.title: Whakamātautau tere pānui
entry.intro:
Ko tēnei whakamātautau hei whakatau tata i tō tere pānui tūturu mā tētahi wāhanga ārahi. Ka whakatuwhera te taupānga i te kuputuhi, ā, ka tatari kia pēhia e koe te Play (▶) i te Matapihi Mānu ina rite koe ki te tīmata. Kia tīmata te whakamātautau, kaua e pēhi Pause (⏸) kia mutu rā anō tō pānui: ka whakamutu te Pause i te whakamātautau; kāore e whakatā i te matawā. Whakamahia Stop/Reset (⏹) anake mēnā e hiahia ana koe ki te whakakore i te whakamātautau. Muri iho, ka taea e koe te arotake i ngā pātai mārama mēnā kei roto i te kuputuhi, ā, i te mutunga, te waihanga preset i te hua.
I mua i te tīmatanga, kia mōhio ko ēnei kuputuhi whakamātautau e tono ana i te 5 ki te 15 meneti o te aro pūmau, kāore he whakararuraru.
Ka whakamahi tēnei pool i ngā kuputuhi poto, nō reira me tūpato ki te whakamāori i te hua. Kaua e whakawhānui tika ki ngā kuputuhi roa, i reira ka uru mai ngā āhuatanga pai pērā i te rere me te horopaki, me ngā āhuatanga kino pērā i te whakahoki ā-hinengaro me te ngenge.
entry.pool_exhausted_message: Kāore he kōnae whakamātautau kāore anō kia whakamahia. Tautuhi anō i te pool, tāpiri rānei i ētahi atu kōnae.
entry.close_aria: Katia te kōrero whakamātautau tere pānui
entry.start_random_confirm: Ka tuhi tēnei ki runga i te kuputuhi o nāianei mā tētahi kuputuhi matapōkere e tika ana nō te pool. Me haere tonu?
entry.reset_confirm: Ka tautuhi anō tēnei i te pool whakamātautau katoa, ā, ka tohu anō i ōna kōnae katoa hei kāore anō kia whakamahia. Me haere tonu?
entry.import_summary: Kua oti te kawemai. Kua kawemai: {imported}. Kua peke i ngā tārua: {skippedDuplicates}. I rahua te manatoko: {failedValidation}. I rahua ngā tāurunga pūranga: {failedArchiveEntries}. I rahua ngā tuhinga: {failedWrites}.

questions.title: Ngā pātai mārama pānui
questions.intro: He kōwhiringa noa te whakautu i ēnei pātai mārama pānui, ā, kāore e pā ki tō kaute whakamutunga. He āwhina noa kia aromatawai koe i te uaua o te kuputuhi me te āhei rānei o tō tere me tō kāhua pānui ki te tae ki tētahi taumata mārama taketake. Kāore ō whakautu e tiakina, e tukuna rānei ki ngā kaiwhakawhanake, ki tētahi atu rānei.
questions.random_value: Kaute tūmanako i raro i te matapae matapōkere: {percentage}
questions.incomplete_warning: Me whakautu ngā pātai katoa i mua i te aromatawai.
questions.chance_at_least_observed: Tūponotanga kia whiwhi i te kaute nei, neke atu rānei, mā te matapae matapōkere: {percentage}

alerts.import_extract_route_choice_required: Me kōwhiri ara mō tēnei PDF i mua i te haere tonu o te tangohanga.
alerts.import_extract_route_choice_message: E wātea ana ngā ara tangohanga e rua mō tēnei PDF. Kōwhiria tētahi kia haere tonu.

alerts.import_extract_apply_error: I puta he hapa i te hoatu i te kuputuhi kua tangohia. Tirohia te papatohu ka ngana anō.

alerts.import_extract_apply_truncated: I hipa te kuputuhi kua tangohia me te hoatu i te rohe, ā, i tapahia.
alerts.import_extract_prepare_invalid: Kua kore e tika te tono kawemai/tango kua whakaritea. Tīmata anō te rere.
alerts.import_extract_ocr_unavailable: Kāore te OCR e wātea ana. Tirohia te whakarite/mana takiuru ka ngana anō.
alerts.import_extract_ocr_activation_required: Me whakahohe te OCR. Takiuru ki Google OCR ka ngana anō.
alerts.import_extract_ocr_activation_disclosure: Ka whakamahi a toT i ngā ratonga Google mō te OCR. Mā te haere tonu ka whakatuwhera tō pūtirotiro kia whakamana ai koe i tēnei taupānga.
Ko ngā kōnae anake ka kōwhiria e koe mō te OCR ka tukuna ki Google.
Ka tiaki tēnei taupānga i ngā raraunga Google OAuth e whakahaerehia ana e te taupānga mō te OCR me te āhua tōkena Google paetata i tēnei tāutanga.
Whai muri i te kaweake, ka ngana te taupānga ki te tango i te tuhinga Google rangitahi i tō Google Drive.
Ā muri ake ka taea te momotu mā Manakohanga > Momotu Google OCR.
Katia te kōrero whakahohe Google OCR
alerts.import_extract_ocr_activation_success: Kua oti te whakahohe OCR. Kei te whakamātau anō i te tangohanga.
alerts.import_extract_ocr_activation_cancelled: Kua whakakorea te whakahohe OCR. Kāore te kawemai/tango i haere tonu.
alerts.import_extract_ocr_token_state_invalid: He muhu te āhua takiuru Google OCR kua tiakina. Tūhono anō ki Google OCR ka ngana anō.
alerts.import_extract_ocr_activation_failed: I rahua te whakahohe OCR. Tirohia te whakarite/mana takiuru ka ngana anō.
alerts.import_extract_ocr_disconnect_success: Kua momotuhia a Google OCR. Kua whakakorengia te tōkena Google kua tiakina, ā, kua tangohia te āhua takiuru paetata.
alerts.import_extract_ocr_disconnect_not_connec: Kāore a Google OCR i te tūhono i tēnei tāutanga taupānga.
alerts.import_extract_ocr_disconnect_failed: I rahua te momotu Google OCR. Kāore te āhua takiuru kua tiakina i tangohia.
alerts.import_extract_ocr_connectivity_failed: Me whai hononga ipurangi te OCR. Tirohia tō hononga ka ngana anō.
alerts.import_extract_ocr_setup_missing_credent: Kāore te OCR e wātea ana i tēnei build taupānga nā te ngaro o ngā raraunga Google OAuth kua takai ki te taupānga.
alerts.import_extract_ocr_setup_invalid_credent: Kāore te OCR e wātea ana i tēnei build taupānga nā te muhu o ngā raraunga Google OAuth kua takai ki te taupānga.
alerts.import_extract_ocr_restricted: Kua rāhuitia te ara OCR mō tēnei momo kōnae.
alerts.import_extract_ocr_quota_or_rate_limited: Kua āraia rangitahitia te OCR e ngā quota/tepe auau. Tatari ka ngana anō.
alerts.import_extract_ocr_runtime_error: I puta he hapa whakahaere OCR i te kawemai/tango. Tirohia te papatohu ka ngana anō.
alerts.import_extract_ocr_cleanup_warning: Kua oti te OCR, engari i rahua te horoi i te kōnae rangitahi mamao. Tirohia tō kōpaki Google Drive.
alerts.import_extract_ocr_apply_pending: Kua oti te tangohanga OCR. Kei te tatari tonu te rere hoatu i muri i te tangohanga kia whakatinanahia.
alerts.import_extract_native_runtime_error: I puta he hapa whakahaere tangohanga native i te kawemai/tango. Tirohia te papatohu ka ngana anō.
alerts.import_extract_native_unreadable_or_corr: Kāore e taea te pānui i te kōnae kua tīpakohia, kua kino rānei mō te tangohanga native.
alerts.import_extract_native_encrypted_or_passw: Kua whakamuna, kua tiakina rānei te PDF kua tīpakohia ki te kupuhipa, ā, kāore e taea te tango mā te ara native.
alerts.import_extract_native_unsupported_format: Kāore tēnei hōputu kōnae e tautokona e te ara tangohanga native.
alerts.import_extract_native_apply_pending: Kua oti te tangohanga native. Kei te tatari tonu te rere hoatu i muri i te tangohanga kia whakatinanahia.
